On this #WorldChildrensDay, and every day, I hope you can do what you can, wherever you are, to keep children’s rights front and centre.

Sky-high views at the peak, fire dragon dance at Tai Hang, coastal island sea view, fine dining and street wok-fires, peaceful escapes in Tai O, electric nights under Cantopop disco lights. All these iconic moments are what I feel in HongKong.    “Hong Kong welcomes Khaby and you”.   #KhabyInHongKong  #TravelWithKhaby #DiscoverHongKong

youtube.description:
SUBSCRIBE FOR A COOKIE!
New MrBeast or MrBeast Gaming video every single Saturday at noon eastern time!
Accomplishments:
- Raised $20,000,000 To Plant 20,000,000 Trees
- Removed 30,000,000 pounds of trash from the ocean
- Helped 2,000 people walk again
- Helped 1,000 blind people see
- Helped 1,000 deaf people hear
- Built wells in Africa
- Built and gave away 100 houses
- Adopted every dog in a shelter (twice)
- Given millions to charity
- Started my own snack company Feastables
- Started my own software company Viewstats
- Started Lunchly, a tasty, better-for-you lunch option
- Gave away a private island (twice)
- Gave away 1 million meals
- I counted to 100k
- Ran a marathon in the world's largest shoes
- Survived 50 hours in Antarctica
- Recreated Squid Game in real life
- Created the largest competition show with 1000 people (Beast Games)
- Gave $5,000,000 to one person
- Passed T-Series to become most subscribed YouTube channel 🥹
you get it, I appreciate all of you so much :)

post_data.title: Last To Leave Grocery Store, Wins $250,000
post_data.description:
imagine living in a grocery store

Special thanks to my friends at Square for supporting neighborhood businesses like The Bread Lady, Simply Natural Creamery, Blackbeard Coffee, and Blue Ox Games. Square is the all-in-one platform that helps businesses like these run smarter every day. Learn more → https://squareup.com

Coca-Cola is offering a chance to collect limited-edition Panini stickers for the FIFA World Cup 2026™. Peel a 20oz Coke label to start your collection and learn more at https://coca-cola.com/panini

Huge shoutout to Good Ranchers for supplying all the meat in this video. Turns out a lot of grocery store meat isn’t actually from the U.S., these guys are fixing that. Check them out at (https://go.goodranchers.com/beast], and save $40 off your first order by clicking the link or using code: BEAST at check out!

Special thanks to our friends at Unilever, Mondelez International, Campbell's, Henkel, Conagra Brands, Procter & Gamble, Kellogg's, and more for keeping us stocked—featuring brands like all Free Clear, Snuggle, Mama Mancini’s, Partanna, In The Raw, Takis, SpaghettiOs, Bigelow Tea, Dove, plus Hunt’s, Pringles, Tide, Bounty, Charmin, Febreze, Persil, AXE, Hellmann’s, Splenda, Entenmann’s, Bimbo Bakeries, Farmland Dairy, got2b, Wish-Bone, Hidden Valley, Ball Park, Quaker, Mezcla, Freestyle, Lull, and Coleman.

We actually put up TV commercials, radio ads, and flyers all around town the week before to get a bunch of random shoppers in the door and offer them the chance to compete in this video! The shoppers who chose to stay and compete all went through the usual review process for any of our videos and had access to the same resources (medics, mental health counselor, etc) as contestants in other videos.

SUBSCRIBE OR I TAKE YOUR DOG
